name: reactive::if_alternate::watch_effect_function::named
source: import { reactive, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = reactive({ active: true }); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(function () { if (guard.active) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });

name: reactive::if_alternate::watch_effect_function::namespace
source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.reactive({ active: true }); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(function () { if (guard.active) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });

name: reactive::logical_rhs::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { reactive, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = reactive({ active: true }); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { guard.active && payload.value; });

name: reactive::ternary_branch::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { reactive, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = reactive({ active: true }); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { guard.active ? payload.value : sink(); });
